rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use valid AGREE syntax: `assume "label": expression;`, `guarantee "label": expression;`
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees without using implementation-only subcomponent paths
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees without using implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
